facebook.caption:
POV: you take the cable car to Hòn Thơm and find a full water park waiting at the bottom.

Aquatopia Water Park sits on the southern tip of Phu Quoc. 4.3 stars across 4,215 reviews. Slides, wave pools, and ocean views all in one spot.

Most people don't realise the cable car ride is half the experience. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Cable car down. Water slides straight ahead. Aquatopia Water Park on Hòn Thơm hits different when the South China Sea is your backdrop. 4.3 stars. 4,215 people agree.

4.7 stars. 1,247 reviews. At a bistro inside Chợ đêm Vuifest - Sunset Town, Phú Quốc.

CÁI MÂM BISTRO is not flying under the radar anymore. Over a thousand people rated it and the score barely moved. That's consistency.

Sunset Town is already worth the trip. Add a meal here and it becomes the highlight. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao

facebook.caption:
7,513 reviews. 4.8 stars. On a pizza place in Phu Quoc.

The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo is not a fluke. Thin crust, solid toppings, cold beer, and a bill that keeps you under $30 for two. Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Dương Đông, easy to find, always busy for a reason.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Hands pulling a fresh pizza at The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo. Over 7,500 people rated this place 4.8 stars. Watch why the table next to you already ordered two rounds.

instagram.caption:

The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo earns every one. Save this.

facebook.caption: Some bars you drink at. Some bars you actually unwind at. HAPPY BEAR Live Music Bar & Bistro on 1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the second kind. This beach fixes burnout.

Bãi Trường runs for miles along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Wide sand, warm water, and enough space that you actually stop checking your phone.

4.3 stars across 741 reviews. The people have spoken.

Skip the resort pool. Walk down here instead.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: POV: you skipped the south coast crowds and ended up at Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc on Đường Dinh Bà, Ông Lang. 4.7 stars across 3,089 reviews. That number doesn't lie. Ông Lang keeps showing up on lists and this resort is a big reason why. Quieter stretch, proper spa, and a pool that isn't wall-to-wall sunbeds. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption: Tourists scroll past this one. Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc sits on Hẻm 126A Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, away from the resort-row chaos. Bungalows right on the beach.
